texto: Believe it or not working in libraries is very similar to working on an ambulance or a fire truck. You take care of a lot of homeless people, you sometimes have to clean up things that require latex gloves, you always wear comfortable shoes, and you put out a lot of “fires”!
explicacao: Orientação direta de Lori Reed sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Believe it or not working in libraries is very similar to working on an ambulance or a fire truck…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, librarian, libraries, útil em momentos de trabalho e librarian.
